name: 2026-06-03 Political Commentary UNSC Bid vs Senate Floor TH
description:
Today the country asked the United Nations for a seat at the Security Council.

This week at home, the Senate could not convene for two days running. A sitting senator is in custody on plunder charges over flood control kickbacks. Inflation in April hit 7.2 percent. The peso is at 61 to the dollar.

A seat at the world's table is a podium. A working Senate is a floor.

Hindi tayo dapat sanay sa mediocre.

custom_fields.value:
Today the country asked the United Nations for a seat at the Security Council.

This week at home, the Senate could not convene for two days running. A sitting senator is in custody on plunder charges over flood control kickbacks. Inflation in April hit 7.2 percent. The peso is at 61 to the dollar.

A seat at the world's table is a podium. A working Senate is a floor.

Hindi tayo dapat sanay sa mediocre.

Today the country asked the United Nations for a seat at the Security Council.

This week at home, the Senate could not convene for two days running. A sitting senator is in custody on plunder charges over flood control kickbacks. Inflation in April hit 7.2 percent. The peso is at 61 to the dollar.

A seat at the world's table is a podium. A working Senate is a floor.

Hindi tayo dapat sanay sa mediocre.

UN Security Council 2026 election held at UN HQ in New York on June 3, 2026 (Asia-Pacific seat: PH vs Kyrgyzstan for 2027-2028 term), per PNA / Inquirer / GMA / Rappler. Senate failed to convene for second consecutive day on June 2, 2026 amid majority bloc boycott, per SunStar Manila. Sitting senator arrested June 1, 2026 on plunder over flood control kickbacks (no right to bail under PH plunder law), per Washington Post and Rappler. April 2026 headline inflation 7.2 percent (highest since March 2023), per PSA / BSP / Tribune / TradingEconomics. PHP/USD at approximately 61.75 on June 3, 2026, per TradingEconomics.
